title: [MooreToCore] Unsupported $fatal to sim.terminate conversion
body:
New circt user here, trying to run circt-verilog on my design.
I run into an issue when trying to parse the $fatal  system verilog system task.

The System Verilog code in question is:
```verilog
 $fatal(1, "Timeout exceeded!");
```

The moore IR emitted is:
```mlir
%12 = moore.fmt.literal "Timeout exceeded!"
moore.builtin.severity fatal %12
moore.builtin.finish_message false
moore.builtin.finish 1
moore.unreachable
```

I suppose this should be converted into a `sim.terminate` op, but I am unsure how to match/combine moore.builtin.finish. Any advice?
code_blocks:
$fatal(1, "Timeout exceeded!");
%12 = moore.fmt.literal "Timeout exceeded!"
moore.builtin.severity fatal %12
moore.builtin.finish_message false
moore.builtin.finish 1
moore.unreachable
